Command.Description: Scan a root folder and create a MetaMesh workspace from discovered meta workspaces.
Command.Name: scan

Command.Description: Suggest logical workspace handles from a root folder without applying changes.
Command.Name: suggest

Command.Description: Inspect mounted paths and modeled links in a MetaMesh workspace.
Command.Name: check

Command.Description: Walk modeled workspace links from one handle.
Command.Name: impact

Command.Description: Mount or update a workspace path under a stable handle.
Command.Name: mount

Command.Description: Add or update a modeled link between two workspace handles.
Command.Name: link
